origin.p1: For millennia, African and Asian pharmacopeia has isolated remarkably powerful active compounds. At HelyaCare, we chose not to choose between heritage and innovation.
origin.p2: Our predictive Artificial Intelligence platform learns from each user to adapt, in real-time, the composition and dosage of each cure. This is no longer supplementation. This is precision nutrition.

pillars.p1_desc: Every botanical active is sourced directly from certified producers. Full traceability, from the field to the laboratory.
pillars.p2_desc: Our formulations are the result of 18 months of research. Each dosage is derived from independent clinical trials, with no compromise on effectiveness.
pillars.p3_desc: Our Doypack refill system reduces plastic waste by 70%. Taking care of yourself shouldn't cost the planet.

heritage.quote: We are building the future of preventive health, rooted in excellence.

cta.desc: Every HelyaCare bottle is a statement: medical precision and environmental ethics are not opposites. They are inseparable.
